Short Description: Winthrop senior travel program offering day trips, shows, casino trips, overnight trips, and extended travel opportunities.
Full Description: Winthrop Senior Center Trips offers senior-friendly travel opportunities including day trips, shows, casino trips, overnight trips, and extended-stay travel. Participants should review the trip flyer, cancellation policy, payment rules, and registration requirements before signing up.

Short Description: Holden senior travel program offering monthly day trips, occasional overnight trips, and trip consortium opportunities with nearby Councils on Aging.
Full Description: Holden Senior Center Trips offers day trips, usually monthly, and occasional overnight trips through the Senior Center. Trips are not restricted to Holden seniors, and reservations are first come, first served. Payment is required when reserving, and cancellation rules apply.
